description_long: This is a military combat tactical vehicle resembling a Humvee, featuring a robust, boxy body with reinforced doors and windows. The exterior is covered in a dark, weathered camouflage paint scheme, blending shades of green, brown, and black. On the roof, there is a visible weapon mount equipped with a machine gun, surrounded by protective armor plating. The vehicle has four large, rugged off-road tires with deep treads, designed for traversing rough urban and off-road environments. The windows are small and likely bullet-resistant, and the vehicle's body is covered with thick, angular armor panels for enhanced protection. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present on the exterior.
description: A heavily armored, camouflaged military tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted machine gun and four rugged off-road tires. Its boxy, reinforced body is designed for urban and combat scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the armored grille, reinforced windshield, and the roof-mounted weapon system.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four large off-road tires, side doors, and the roof weapon mount.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor plating and the compact, boxy structure of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side doors, tires, and the roof-mounted weapon.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible weapon mount on the roof, equipped with a machine gun.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating, including reinforced doors and roof panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark woodland camouflage pattern with irregular patches of green, brown, and black.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
